channel.title: Kyunolab Mystery Archive
channel.description: Legends, folklore, mysteries, and strange tales.

item.title: The Grocery Receipt That Listed One Item No One Bought
item.description: A late-night receipt that included a candle, a bus ticket, and one item the customer swore never entered the cart.

item.title: The Bus Seat That Is Always Saved by a Stranger
item.description: A regular bus seat passengers avoid because someone always seems to be waiting for the person who sits there.

item.title: The Apartment Hallway That Smells Like Rain Before Bad News
item.description: A dry apartment corridor where residents describe the smell of rain just before a small domestic crisis.

item.title: The Checkout Camera That Blinks Before a Missing Wallet
item.description: A corner-store camera that seems to blink out during every retelling of a missing wallet rumor.

item.title: The Taxi Passenger Who Gives the Same Wrong Address
item.description: A taxi passenger who asks for an address that does not exist, then leaves behind the same folded street map.

item.title: The Elevator Voice That Says One Extra Floor
item.description: An office elevator announcement that names a floor between two real floors when only one person is inside.

item.title: The Coin Locker That Opens Before the Key Turns
item.description: A station locker that clicks open a second early for travelers who later find something missing from their plans.

item.title: The Office Window That Shows Lights After Everyone Leaves
item.description: A dark office building where one window appears lit in stories told by cleaners and late commuters.

item.title: The Parking Ticket Printed for Tomorrow Morning
item.description: A parking ticket stamped with a time that had not arrived yet, retold as a warning about the wrong street.

item.title: The Laundromat Machine That Keeps One Name in Its Display
item.description: A laundromat washer whose small digital display keeps showing a name no customer admits entering.

item.title: The Screenshot Folder That Creates One Empty File Every Night
item.description: A shared screenshot folder where one blank file appears each night and turns into an online routine of checking.

item.title: The Forum Avatar That Turns Around Only in Archived Copies
item.description: An old forum avatar that seems unchanged live but appears to face backward in saved archive pages.

item.title: The Playlist Track That Has No Audio but Keeps Getting Shared
item.description: A silent playlist track that spreads because listeners insist the pause arrives at the same uncomfortable second.

item.title: The Captcha Image With the Same Empty Street
item.description: A captcha street scene users claim appears across unrelated sites with one unlit house always centered.

item.title: The Livestream Delay That Answers Questions First
item.description: A livestream delay rumor where the answer appears in chat before the question is spoken aloud.

item.title: The Deleted Account That Still Likes Old Posts
item.description: A deleted profile that continues appearing in like counts on old posts after its page no longer loads.

item.title: The Map Review Written From a Closed Location
item.description: A review posted from a location marked closed years earlier, copied until it becomes a digital place legend.

item.title: The Comment Timestamp That Counts Backward
item.description: A comment thread where one timestamp seems to count backward whenever screenshots circulate.

item.title: The Shared Image That Loses One Window Each Repost
item.description: A familiar image of an apartment block that appears to lose one lit window in each reposted copy.

item.title: The Search Suggestion That Names a Page Before It Exists
item.description: A search suggestion that appears before anyone can find the page it seems to predict.
